description: Controls duplicate signal penalties and contribution caps for future rule aggregation.

FeatureOverlapPenalty.description: Reduces score when multiple variables reuse nearly identical source signals.

FeatureCorrelationPenalty.description: Applies penalty when historical feature correlation exceeds a threshold.

SourceContributionCap.description: Caps total score contribution from one source family.

GroupContributionCap.description: Caps group-level contribution to avoid one domain dominating decisions.

IndependentSignalCount.description: Requires multiple independent confirmations for high-conviction actions.

RiskSignalOverride.description: Allows critical risk variables to override opportunity scores.
